name: Sangeet
subtitle: Dance the night away in style
description: The sangeet is your night to be bold and expressive. Our sangeet collection features statement pieces that move beautifully — from cascading chandbalis to layered necklaces and vibrant colour-play.
styling_tips: Choose jewellery that moves with you for the sangeet. Jhumkas and long earrings add drama on the dance floor. Go for lightweight options that are comfortable for hours of dancing.
meta_description: Shop sangeet jewellery at Ria Art Jewellery Mumbai. Statement and dance-friendly jewellery for the sangeet ceremony.
